name: hdbt_subtheme
description: Theme builder configuration for HDBT subtheme
author: Druid

scripts.build: npm run format:js --loglevel=silent && npm run lint --loglevel=silent && node theme-builder.mjs
scripts.lint:scss: npx --prefix ../../contrib/hdbt/theme-builder postcss "$INIT_CWD/src/scss/**/*.scss" --syntax postcss-scss --use css-declaration-sorter --replace --no-map && npm run lint:stylelint --loglevel=silent

@comment dependencies: The following packages were updated manually.
Remove this section once the dependencies have been updated in their respective upstream packages.
